Description: Last date funds must be repaid, inclusive of borrower-discretion extension options per most recent credit agreement. Conditional extensions = borrower discretion. Demand loans = 9999-01-01. Commitments to commit: estimated maturity.
Allowable Values: yyyy-mm-dd format

Description: Original amortization term in months from Field 10 date at rate implied by current payment. Interest only = 0. After IO period, months to fully amortize. Non-standard = -1.
Allowable Values: Whole months (e.g. 120 for 10 years). -1 for non-standard.

Description: Whether credit facility has full, partial, or no recourse to sponsor or guarantor as of reporting date.
Allowable Values: 1=DO NOT USE; 2=DO NOT USE; 3=Full; 4=Partial; 5=None

Description: Internal line of business. Must be consistent with H.3 Field 1.
Allowable Values: Free text (e.g. Retail, Private Banking, Corporate Banking)

Description: Current physical occupancy of rent-paying tenants as % of net rentable sq ft. NA for construction/land development without certificate of occupancy. Condo: units owned by borrower.
Allowable Values: Fraction to 2 decimals (e.g. 0.80 for 80%). 0 if actually zero. NA if not applicable.

Description: Name of anchor tenant(s) named in co-tenancy clause or with majority of gross rental income. Multiple tenants separated by double semi-colon.
Allowable Values: No vertical bar, carriage return, line feed, comma, or unprintable characters. Multiple names: ;; separator.

Description: Purpose of CRE Loan at origination date per Field 10.
Allowable Values: 1=Construction Build to Suit/Credit Tenant Lease; 2=Land Acquisition & Development; 3=Construction Other; 4-5=DO NOT USE; 6=Acquisition (nonowner occupied); 7=Refinance; 8=Other; 9=Mini-Perm; 10-12=DO NOT USE

Description: Variability of current interest rates to maturity. Undrawn: rate that would apply if funded. Allows fixed or floating at borrower discretion = Mixed. Entirely fee based = 4.
Allowable Values: 0=DO NOT USE; 1=Fixed; 2=Floating; 3=Mixed; 4=Entirely fee based

Description: Current interest rate charged. Multiple draws: dollar weighted average on drawn balance exclusive of swaps. Undrawn: rate per credit agreement. Undrawn with multiple rates: most conservative (highest).
Allowable Values: Decimal (e.g. 0.0575 for 5.75%). NA if entirely fee based.

Description: Base interest rate index for floating rate loans. If borrower has option, select index in use. Fixed/fee based = Not applicable. Mixed base rates = Mixed.
Allowable Values: 0=DO NOT USE; 1=LIBOR; 2=PRIME or Base; 3=Treasury Index; 4=Other; 5=Not applicable; 6=Mixed; 7=SOFR

Description: Spread from base rate for floating rate loans (positive or negative). Fixed/fee based = NA. Multiple draws: spread approximating overall.
Allowable Values: Decimal (e.g. 0.0575 for 5.75%). NA if fixed/fee based. Negative sign for negatives.

Description: Rate ceiling for floating rate loans per credit agreement. No ceiling = NONE. Fixed/fee based = NA. Multiple ceilings: provide maximum.
Allowable Values: Decimal (e.g. 0.0575). NA if fixed/fee based. NONE if no ceiling.

Description: Rate floor for floating rate loans per credit agreement. No floor = NONE. Fixed/fee based = NA. Multiple floors: provide minimum.
Allowable Values: Decimal (e.g. 0.0575). NA if fixed/fee based. NONE if no floor.

Description: Frequency of interest rate reset in months for floating rate loans. Frequencies < 1 month = 1. Fixed/fee based = NA.
Allowable Values: Whole months. NA if fixed/fee based.

Description: Remaining interest reserves from original construction commitment for construction/lease-up phases. Prorated for participations. Non-applicable or unfunded = 0.
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar. No cents, punctuation, or dollar signs. 0 if not applicable.

Description: Bank's total commitment as of origination date (Field 10). Includes drawn and undrawn. Pro-rata for multiple lenders.
Allowable Values: Round to whole dollar. No punctuation or dollar sign.

Description: Internal ID from previous submission. For commitment-to-commit fulfillment, report prior ID. No change or first submission = Field 1 value. Disposed rebookings: comma-separated IDs.
Allowable Values: No carriage return, line feed, or unprintable characters. Comma-separated for multiple.

Description: Whether loan was acquired via bank/portfolio/individual loan purchase outside original underwriting syndication. Originated/underwritten by reporting bank = No. No longer acquired after renewal/modification.
Allowable Values: 1=Yes; 2=No

Field Name: # Days Principal or Interest Past Due
Description: Longest number of days P&I past due if >= 30 days. As of last day of reporting period or disposition date. If not 30+ days past due = 0. Undrawn = 0.
Allowable Values: Numbers only. 0 if not past due or undrawn.

Description: Date credit facility placed on non-accrual. If none, 9999-12-31. Undrawn = 9999-12-31.
Allowable Values: yyyy-mm-dd format

Description: For single-property facilities: report size for predominant property type (sq ft, rooms, units, lots, or acreage). Multiple property types w/o predominant = Other. Property type Other = Other. Multiple properties = NA.
Allowable Values: Whole number. Other or NA as applicable.
